extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Agent Builder in Studio Web with the agent configuration canvas on the left and the Choose tool side panel open on the right. The Tools section is visible with the Add tool button, and the toolbox list displays available tool types. The RPA workflow option is highlighted, indicating the user is about to add an automation workflow as a tool to the agent.
step_instructions: Click on Add tool in the Tools section.
In the Choose tool panel, select RPA workflow from the Toolbox list.

layout.rationale: High density (1250 chars) + wide (1.14) or very high text
